changes.task: Fix Kuzu NOT IN syntax + add regression test
changes.description: Changed 'n.file_path NOT IN [...]' to 'NOT n.file_path IN [...]' at storage.py:435. Added 3 regression tests for get_reverse_dependency_files().
Replaced minimal 'graph venv not found' message with actionable warning including venv creation and pip install instructions.
Added relationship_count() call to _graph_stats() return dict and updated text output format to include relationship count.
